summary: Single Team subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive subscribed team - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user has a single team entitlement
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is archived

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archived ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN a feed select modal displays
AND buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the game feed
AND the user will see an ESPN feed button for the home team
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button
